name: agent-testing-bot
tagline: Extends the generic agent-testing skill to drive real bot chat apps (Discord/Slack/Telegram/WeChat/Lark/QQ/iMessage) on macOS via osascript.
verdict: No security issues: no secrets, network exfiltration, or destructive commands, and it clearly scopes itself to bot-channel testing only. Well-triggered and reasonably actionable, but leans on the parent skill for failure handling and gives no concrete example invocation of its own driver script.

highlights.summary: Screen-recording gate is described but this file never states what to do if osascript itself fails or the app isn't running/logged in.
Driver script usage is given only as a signature `test-$PLATFORM-bot.sh $CHANNEL_OR_CONTACT $MESSAGE ...`, no concrete worked example call.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
